title: Five stages are independently optional and independently fallible — partial briefs are normal
summary: The chain runs Perplexity -> SpiderSite -> SpiderCompanyData -> SpiderPeople -> SpiderVerify in sequence, but each stage is toggled independently (config.<stage>.enabled) and can come back empty without failing the run: no LinkedIn page found, registry miss, a site with no emails. A completed job with an empty section is a legitimate partial brief. Read each stage's status, not just the top-level job status, before telling the user a field is missing. Also: company_registry and linkedin_profiles are STANDALONE IDAP types, not include= relations on businesses.
references: app/flows/company-intel.yaml:10-15 — steps: perplexity-discovery, siteScraper, companyRegistry, linkedinProfiles, emailVerify
app/schemas/company_intel.py:14-47 — each stage has its own enabled toggle
app/services/idap_service.py:33-34 — company_registry + linkedin_profiles are top-level TABLE_MAP types
